subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto thee, that the fragrances of Revelation may draw thee unto God, the Help in Peril, the Self-Subsisting. Turn thou unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الیک لتجذبک نفحات الوحی الی الله المهیمن القیوم اقبل الی
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @living waters; water of life
